description_long: This is a tall, slender traffic cone with a bright green color, featuring a conical upper section and a cylindrical lower section. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with a distinct red arrow marking on a white rectangular background on one side of the lower section. The tip is pointed and solid, seamlessly transitioning from the wider base. The base is hexagonal and robust, providing stability, and the overall structure is likely made of durable plastic. There are no visible reflective stripes, but the vivid coloration and the arrow marking enhance its visibility. The object appears to be in new or excellent condition, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A bright green, smooth traffic cone with a pointed tip and a red arrow marking on one side. The base is hexagonal and stable, and the cone appears new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green cone with a red arrow marking on a white background clearly visible on the lower section.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the edge of the red arrow marking, with most of the surface being plain green.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain green surface with no markings or features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows only the green surface, with no markings or additional features.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the object.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and green, with a smooth finish and no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is hexagonal, wide, and stable, made of the same green plastic as the rest of the cone, with no visible patterns or textures.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: A red arrow marking on a white rectangular background is visible on one side of the lower section.
attribute_condition: The object appears new and undamaged, with no visible wear, dirt, or fading.
